era: 1982-1992. Lo-Fi Punk. E=5 -- deliberate minimal, anti-professional, childlike, joyful. Olympia.
associated_musicians: Tobi Vail (K Records / Evergreen connection -- Bikini Kill at 276)
Kathleen Hanna (Olympia scene -- Bikini Kill at 276)

theory_nodes.concept: OLYMPIA ENTERS ENGINE. First non-Seattle/Tacoma/Eastside city. Beat Happening is the first Olympia-based entry in the entire S36 catalog. Geographic milestone. Evergreen State College nexus. Anti-careerist by design.
theory_nodes.description: Olympia enters at degree 275. The I-5 corridor's southern node.

theory_nodes.concept: K Records enters. Calvin Johnson founded K Records (1982) -- same year as Beat Happening. Handmade aesthetic, cassette era, International Pop Underground 1991. The infrastructure of the Pacific Northwest indie underground. Still active in the 2020s.
theory_nodes.description: K Records: the foundational label of the Olympia scene and the aesthetic infrastructure for riot grrrl.

theory_nodes.concept: Lo-fi as political choice. Childlike aesthetic: directness, sincerity, absence of irony, no pre-emptive self-censorship. The simplicity makes emotional content (darkness underneath 'Indian Summer', 'Black Candy') more direct and more powerful.
theory_nodes.description: Deliberate minimal: the rough recording says the idea matters more than the production.

theory_nodes.concept: Riot grrrl lineage. K Records → IPU Convention (August 1991) → 'Love Rock Revolution Girl Style Now' (August 20, 1991) → riot grrrl. Tobi Vail and Kathleen Hanna from the Olympia/K scene. Beat Happening as immediate precursor.
theory_nodes.description: K Records as riot grrrl infrastructure.

theory_nodes.concept: Kurt Cobain K tattoo. Documented tribute to Calvin Johnson and K Records. The Olympia-to-Seattle influence vector. Beat Happening's sincerity influenced Cobain's artistic ethics, documented in journals and interviews.
theory_nodes.description: Olympia to Seattle: the influence runs south to north as well as north to south.

cross_references.relationship: Energy drops 8 to 5. Seattle (Capitol Hill) to Olympia. Largest energy drop in hardcore-to-indie transition. The conscious alternative to high-energy commercial moment.
Energy rises 5 to 8. K Records/IPU lineage continues directly. Tobi Vail connects K Records to Bikini Kill. Riot grrrl emerges from the Olympia scene built by Beat Happening and K Records.
K tattoo: documented tribute to Calvin Johnson and K Records. Sub Pop and K Records as the two poles of PNW indie; Cobain aligned himself with both.

sps_pair.pairing_note: E=7. Combined E=12. Rhythmic percussion paired with Beat Happening's rhythmic lo-fi. Both are about rhythm and pattern: the pec-slap's body percussion, Beat Happening's minimal drumming.
